claimText: SODAR stands for Sound Detection and Ranging.
evidenceExcerpt: SODAR (Sound Detection and Ranging) system facility
examUse: Statement-based question on the full form and underlying technology of SODAR.

claimText: A SODAR system facility was inaugurated at the India Meteorological Department (IMD) in Delhi.
evidenceExcerpt: SODAR (Sound Detection and Ranging) system facility has been inaugurated at India Meteorological Department (IMD), Delhi.
examUse: Fact-based question identifying the institution and location of the SODAR facility.
